name: Bug report
about: A recipe or value in this skill produced a wrong or misleading result
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''

## What went wrong

<!-- Describe the incorrect behaviour. What did the skill instruct? What actually happened? -->

## Affected file and section

<!-- e.g. references/ansys-thermal-contact-pitfalls.md — CONTA174 KEYOPT(1) section -->

## Solver / platform / version

<!-- e.g. Ansys Mechanical 2024 R2 on Windows 11; or PyMAPDL 0.68 + MAPDL 2024R1 -->

## Steps to reproduce

<!-- Minimal deck/script that demonstrates the problem. Omit proprietary geometry; a simple geometry (block, bar) is usually enough. -->

## Expected result

<!-- What the skill says should happen. -->

## Actual result

<!-- What actually happened — error message, wrong value, etc. Paste only the relevant lines, not the full log. -->

## Suggested fix (optional)

<!-- If you know the correct recipe or value, please include it with a confidence tag ([AUTHOR-VERIFIED] / [DOCS-ONLY] / etc.) and the source. -->
